da.meta_desc: Dit personlige medlemsområde hos Yoga Bible. Adgang til skema, butik, kurser og eksklusivt indhold.
da.guest_text: Log ind eller opret en konto for at få adgang til dit personlige medlemsområde.
da.guest_benefit_heading: Som medlem får du adgang til
da.guest_benefit_1: Book yogahold direkte fra dit dashboard
da.guest_benefit_4: Adgang til eksklusivt indhold og kursusmaterialer
da.guest_benefit_6: Administrer dit medlemskab og dine indstillinger
da.hero_subtitle: Dit personlige dashboard hos Yoga Bible
da.section_quick_subtitle: Alt hvad du har brug for, samlet ét sted.
da.card_schedule_desc: Book dine yogahold for den kommende uge
da.card_visits_desc: Se dine seneste hold og tilmeldinger
da.section_perks_subtitle: Som medlem af Yoga Bible har du adgang til meget mere end bare yogahold.
da.perk_1_desc: Book og administrer dine hold direkte fra dit dashboard — når som helst, hvor som helst.
da.perk_2_desc: Få adgang til medlemsartikler, guides og fordybende indhold i Yoga Journal.
da.perk_3_desc: Er du tilmeldt en uddannelse? Find alt dit kursusmateriale samlet ét sted.
da.perk_4_desc: Alle dine køb og betalinger dokumenteret og tilgængelige.
da.section_cta_title: Klar til at komme i gang?
da.section_cta_text: Udforsk dit dashboard og book dit næste yogahold.

en.meta_desc: Your personal member area at Yoga Bible. Access schedule, store, courses and exclusive content.
en.guest_text: Sign in or create an account to access your personal member area.
en.guest_benefit_heading: As a member you get access to
en.guest_benefit_1: Book yoga classes directly from your dashboard
en.guest_benefit_2: Buy class passes and packages online
en.guest_benefit_3: View your visit history and receipts
en.guest_benefit_4: Access exclusive content and course materials
en.guest_benefit_5: Read member articles in the Yoga Journal
en.hero_subtitle: Your personal dashboard at Yoga Bible
en.section_quick_subtitle: Everything you need, all in one place.
en.card_schedule_desc: Book your yoga classes for the week ahead
en.card_store_desc: Buy class passes, packages and deposits
en.card_courses_desc: Access course materials and track progress
en.card_visits_desc: View your recent classes and bookings
en.card_journal_desc: Read articles and exclusive member content
en.section_perks_subtitle: As a Yoga Bible member, you get access to much more than just yoga classes.
en.perk_1_desc: Book and manage your classes directly from your dashboard — anytime, anywhere.
en.perk_2_desc: Access member articles, guides and in-depth content in the Yoga Journal.
en.perk_3_desc: Enrolled in a training? Find all your course materials in one place.
en.perk_4_desc: All your purchases and payments documented and accessible.
en.section_cta_text: Explore your dashboard and book your next yoga class.
